They can't stay underwater for too long." Asked Ashley. Good question, Queen, thanks for asking, you thought. "Meh. I just put it in my sock and tie a knot. Then in the sneaker it goes ! Last time I untied the knot but forgot him in my sock ahah. I thought I lost it." said Elsa, laughing. The other girls where giggling as well. " For me, when I have no time I put it in a bottle. Just make a tiny hole so it can breath, and it's good." said Sara. "And you, Eden ?" Asked Ashley. "Ah, I've got this... it's a cigarette box holder that was my Mother's. It's pink so I took it. When the bug is inside, it cannot move at all ahahah !" her evil laughter was followed by the other girls' giggles. You didn't dare to imagine how it would be to be stuffed in that tiny box for a long time.

By chance, Ashley didn't have that kind of box, but she had a bottle of water and socks. But, hey, great. At least you wouldn't drown in Ashley's swimsuit. You felt much love for her being so compassionate. Her little girl's carelessness made you appreciate the slightest sign of care. Ashley sat on the bench in the booth and started undressing. She put off her top tank, her sneakers and her socks. Then, her pink sweatpants and finally, your fabric prison. You could see the outside world, so that should've made you happy, but you were rather sad to leave your safe place, close to her, even for a short while. The swimming lessons would last too long for you.

You were suddenly cold in this big room, filled with sound of little girls chatting and laughing while they were dressing: you missed the moist warmth of her privates. She picked you up and thought for a while, her finger on her lip. "Mmmmh..." she said. "Where should I put you, Slave ?" "No need to stuck me in a sock or jail me in a bottle, my Queen. I'll never leave you !" you said, quite convincingly (because it was true). Ashley had a beautiful smile. She was so cute and adorable, especially while smiling. She put a strand of her hair behind her ear, and said : "I know, I know, but it's to keep you safe. Lemme see..." she said, grabbing her water bottle in her bag. The bottle was almost empty, so Ashley brought it to her mouth and drank what was left.

Then she put you in it, let you sliding to the bottom of that plastic bottle. A mere plastic bottle was now your inescapable prison. She turned the cap firmly, but had nothing to make a hole in the bottle. She shrugged, and put her swimsuit on. It was a one-piece, light blue with pink edges, and on her sides, stripes of white and other colors. She was so cute wearing it !

Your vision of the outside was kinda blurry, and it was moist and cold inside that bottle. The humps of the bottom were uncomfortable, but you managed to sit down. You hoped there was enough air for you in that bottle. Ashley put her clothes in the bag, and the bottle above them. Only the top of the bottle was out of the bag which she closed as she could. Therefore, your plastic prison wasn't dark but you couldn't use your weight to move it.

"Later, Slave !" she said, at least that's what you understood because her voice was muffled and distorted. So Ashley was gone swimming, leaving her bag in the booth, just like the other girls did.

A long time passed. The changing room was quite calm, since now all the girls were learning how to swim. You didn't like the bottle prison; it was cold and moist, and you had nothing to dry yourself or getting warmer. At least it wouldn't be always like that.

Then, after what seemed like days, you heard some noise, like naked feet on tiles. A girl was back from the swimming pool and approaching. The sound was muffled but it was the only one in that room, you couldn't be wrong. That person (probably a schoolgirl) was rushing. Then, a hand opened the bottle you were in and reversed the bag - and the bottle. There was nothing to grab to, and it was probably Ashley, so you let yourself slide to a giant hand that was waiting for you outside.

You fell face first on her palm, and turned back to watch her. Your jaw fell in surprise when you noticed that it wasn't Ashley ! It was...
11113111112111121111121111.title: The abduction

111131111121111211111211111.content:
Eden.

That little redhead witch. Cute, but deadly.

She took you away from Ashley. She stole you ! And she hated the guts out of tiny people, it seemed. Unfortunately for you, the huge gap between you and her made any resistance impossible, and jumping out of her hand was out of the question, you might die from that height. You were looking at each other, in a moment frozen in time, as you didn't fully understand what was happening yet.

Her swimsuit was half pink and white striped, and half pink with white dots. She had removed her bathing cap and she was still wet. Suddenly, she closed her hand, entirely covering you with her wet fingers. It smelled like chlorine, and it burned your lungs.

She didn't say a word and was walking, probably to her own booth. Other girls were arriving, and you started to feel panicked. She really stole you from Ashley. What would happen to you ? Will you ever see Ashley again ? You felt so sad thinking about Ashley's deception, when she'll find out you disappeared. She wasn't an idiot, she'll know you were taken by someone else. But... if she was everything to you, you were disposable and replaceable to her...

You squirmed, desperate, but to no avail. Eden felt it but only clutched you stronger. She put off her swimsuit and grabbed her towel, all while keeping you in hand. She dried herself, and stopped to think for a while. "Broken one in the box... where to put this one..." she thought, whispering to herself. You managed to understand she was thinking about where to put you. You tried to scream but her giant fingertip against your face muffled your complaints.

Then she made you slide between index and thumb, and looked at you. She spoke in a hushed and evil voice. "Silence, bug. If I hear you, I destroy you." she squeezed you with her fingers and it was excessively painful. All the air in your lungs was forced out, and you thought you were about to spit your organs out. You cried silently, almost passing out, and she released the pressure. She could kill you with just two fingers.

Her threat was really clear and she wasn't joking. You'd have to obey but also to find a way to get back to Ashley, whatever the cost. Eden's pink lips sketched a satisfied smile. She put on her pink panties (were they the same that she was already wearing last week-end ?) and put you on the back side. You fell along her ass crack, landing softly close to her nether region. There were stains of brown and dark indescribable stuff where you landed, which answered your question. They were probably the same panties than a few days ago.

The stench was atrocious. Her body odor, her fragrance and the pulp smell in Eden's nether regions were absolutely different from Ashley's. You were starting to like Ashley's fragrance, even her farts in general, but Eden's was an absolute toxic nightmare. But it was not a matter of hygiene. It might be because of your size, or your constant contact with their skin : you felt the difference between the two smells. And god, you sure weren't accustomed to Eden's perfumes. There was also that chlorine smell still lingering. But it was easily covered by the smell of old farts in here.

Eden plucked you through her pink panties, and placed you carefully between her butt cheeks; then with her index she pushed you to her anus. She also gave herself a wedgie, so her panties were keeping the pressure on you. You couldn't move and you were directly face-to-hole. You didn't dare open your mouth, and breathing through your nose was a torture. Playfully, she tightened her buttocks, squeezing you with force. You emitted a cry because of the pain.

Then she put on her tight jeans, hugging her butt perfectly. You were definitely stuck in here, even if the panties were to ease up, the jeans were keeping the pressure. That was the beginning of a nightmare. You couldn't call Ashley nor escape. You'll have to find an opportunity to escape.

She sealed you. And Ashley was so close, but you couldn't do anything to get her help. Would she be angry at Eden if she knew about that ? She was her friend. But you were her brother... and Slave! Okay, now you had to focus on your breath. Getting used to that new smell. As Eden walked, you felt her movements, her cheeks slightly tossing left, right, left, right. She chatted with Elsa and Sara. Then Ashley arrived. You tried to scream but you were so tightly squeezed, your voice was muffled by Eden's ass.

"I think someone stole my pet. Geez. I'll have to get another one..." said Ashley, obviously sad. "Don't worry, it's easy getting one you know." Eden said. That monster ! She said that, knowing you were right here, just between her butt cheeks ! "I can lend you mine if you want, I wanted to trade anyway." Sara said. "That could do it, for a while I think." What ? Will Sam, your best friend, replace you to serve Ashley ? You squirmed in protest. Eden's response was fast: her ass twitched, opened and she let out a huge fart, sounding like a horn. The smell was like rotten meat and the bottom of a dumpster. Atrocious. And you got it fully in the face, getting partially covered with dark matter. You coughed as you could, despite the pressure, and your breath was hoarse for a long time. No way to get Ashley's attention from here.

The girls went out. "See ya tomorrow" Eden said. "Yeah... bye..." you heard Ashley said. The tone of her voice broke your heart. You cried knowing Ashley missed you and you couldn't tell her you were there, a few meters away.

Eden took the bus to go home. The wedgie she made herself made you really uncomfortable. The stench never left you. When sat in the bus, she quietly grunted, trying to fart. Her brown eye blinked a few times, but no gas went out. You hold your breath as you could, focusing on not breathing these horrors, but when you caught your breath again, she let out a silent but deadly one. She was chatting and laughing with another girl, and sometimes she tightened her cheeks to squeeze you.

That girl was not careless like Ashley, she did it on purpose. You were sure of it. Torturing you was a pleasure for her, when Ashley didn't care, which was... heh, kinda better, you supposed. At least Ashley was nice and kind.

Eden finally got off the bus. You felt her walking, opening a door and saying "I'm back, Mom !". You had no idea where she lived, was it far from Ashley ? "Hey, Emma !" she said, but you couldn't hear any answers. Apparently she had a sister.

Finally, she let her schoolbag fall on the ground and stretched (squeezing you by the way). She pulled the edges of her panties, freeing you from that wedgie, and plunged her hand to grab you. Only your head was out of her grip. She squeezed you a few times, and sat on her bed.

"Welcome home, bug." she smiled, like a little girl would smile. But for you it was evil. "I'm not yours, I belong to Ash-" you started, but she clenched her fist harder. " You will do what I say, when I say ! Stupid bug ! You will talk, when I say you must talk !" she kept clenching harder. You couldn't breathe, and you were about to be totally mashed. You cried and you almost fainted. "Why, am I dying ? Hell, hell is here..." you thought. Finally, she released the pressure. You could breath again, but it was very painful.

So you didn't dare to talk. You were just looking at her, waiting for her next speaking. "I always wanted to have you. Even before you were fixed." By "fixed", did she mean "shrunk" ? She continued. "I'm Goddess. I like that word. You'll like it too ! I'll show you my collection..." then, she stood up and opened a drawer. Inside, a pink keepsake box with a lock. From a pocket of her jeans, she took a key and opened it. Inside, 2 other guys, kneeling. "Oh, there's also that one !" she took the little cig box holder, which was also pink, and shook it. After a good laugh at the discomfort of the poor guy inside, she opened it and let him fall in the keepsake box. He was visibly on the verge of death.

"Alright. Here is Crybaby, Toot and Poot. And you... what should I name you..." she was still holding you, and the other guys (those who were conscious) took a discreet look at you. Then Eden decided. "You'll be Dookie !" What ? For real ? You already missed being called Slave by Ashley. You didn't forget you had to cope with her, at least for a while. She was too severe, it would be inconsiderate to defy her. At least right now.

"Ah, look at Crybaby. So fragile, always whining like a baaaaby." She said, plucking the patently dying guy. She put you in the little keepsake box with the two other guys, ... Toot and Poot. With her free hand she took her phone from her pocket. "I'm gonna get rid of it, but on video ! How many likes will I get on the Tiny App ?" Then she gasped: she had another idea. "I'm bored with it, I hope you're more resistant, Dookie. I'm gonna do a video of getting rid of Crybaby, but you will choose how ! So, what should I do with it ? You tell me, Dookie. Should I toss it in the toilet or eat it ? Maybe crush it with my Converses ?"

Did she really asked you to choose the fate of that guy you didn't even know ? She... she said "eat it" ? Would she really swallow that boy entirely ? You took a look at the other guys, still kneeling in total submission. Panic invaded you once more. "I... heh... What..."

"If you don't help me decide, I'll choose for it... and for you, Dookie. But that'll make me angry to loose my newfound toy. So you'd better be quick, or it'll be worse for you !" Was she really 9, or an insane girl from the mental ward ? There was no other way, if you wanted to survive this, you'd have to choose...

Your sister gives you no response. This starts worrying you greatly. She must know that she swallowed you...right? Then what's the hold-up?

...

"Uh oh..." Ashley thinks to herself, with no idea what to do. She's lifted up her shirt to see her rumbling flat belly, and pats it with her other hand.
*uuuuuuuuurrrrrp* Ashley lets out a big childlike burp tasting of sugary cereal...and you.

Ashley racks her brain. What should she do? If Mom finds out that she ate her brother, she'll get in big trouble for sure! She's not entirely sure of what happens to food after she eats it, but she does at least know that whatever gets into her stomach doesn't come back at all like the way it went in. Would you even survive the trip...? And if you didn't...would anyone ever think that you were eaten by your sister...?
125122.title: A Nine-Year-Old's Ruminations

1251222.content:
Ashley gives the situation the best thought that her nine-year-old mind could, and comes to a chilling answer. She could save herself completely, and still enjoy this amazing feeling of being full off of breakfast and her brother, by keeping him in her stomach. The last thing anyone would think of when you go missing is that a sixteen-year-old boy was eaten alive by his kid sister and melted into slosh inside her belly.

She burps again, and goes to take a good nap. You realize that she intends to digest you. Ashley's stomach is unbearably humid, cramped, and shaking with horrifying noises. The "cereal" you're standing on is steadily bubbling and boiling in a pool of stomach acid, liquifying and deteriorating your safe spot.

Deciding to take a nap to take her mind off of eating her brother to avoid getting in trouble, Ashley heads to her room. With each step you shift back and forth, nearing the dangerous pit of acid eating away at your mushy cereal platform. "Don't be mad Jack, I'll let you out when I know I won't get in trouble." She says with a yawn, patting her flat stomach as she lies down on her bed. The motion almost throws you into the acid, but it doesn't matter. Ashley lying down turns your world 90 degrees and both you and the cereal are thrown to the side in a wash of digested mush and acids.

"Ashleeeey! Let me out!" You scream as she rolls over, bouncing you around the soft walls of her stomach and thoroughly coating you with her digestive juices. She does't even realize she's going to kill you.

You hear her thunderous heartbeat begin to slow as she drifts off to sleep, her stomach gurgling faintly to her but deafeningly to you. You feel your entire body itching as the digestive enzymes coating your body start to go to work. You fall to your knees inside the stomach of your 9 year old sister, hitting the folds of her small stomach in frustration.

Then you get an idea. Looking up, you see the tight contracted muscle leading to the esophagus. If Ashley is asleep and all of her muscles are relaxed then it might be possible to squeeze through and have her cough you up. On the other hand, you might not be able to. Or even worse, you might choke her. Even though she decided to hide you away in her stomach she obviously didn't know she was killing you. You decide to...

Being inside Ashley has awakened a dormant vore fetish.

You push against the walls of her stomach as hard as you can and feel them give slightly, expanding as if she just ate a huge meal. They are covered in a slimy substance but firm and warm. When you stop pushing a loud gurgle hits your ears and the pool of stomach acid surrounding you bubbles slightly. You decide to venture to what would be the bottom of her stomach if she weren't laying down.

With her heartbeat providing a dramatic drum-roll to back up your exploration you crawl your way down her stomach. Before you hit the end Ashley sighs in her sleep and rolls onto her back. The motion throws you 90 degrees once more and you end up thrown in a heap in her pooling digestive juices. Still, you tough it out and finally you reach the other end of her stomach. The acids are starting to get uncomfortable and it's been about 30 minutes. You start to worry that Ashley is taking more than a quick nap.

1251222122.content:
Your skin starts to turn red with heightened irritation as you stew in the steamy bubbly pool of Ashley's stomach acid covering the entire floor of the humid and gurgly room you're currently captive in. What was once tasty cereal is now a boiling mush, releasing pockets of trapped gases every now and then, and desperately trying to make your body a protein-packed meaty addition to the slosh.

Standing by the entrance deeper into your sister's body, you are beginning to feel...aroused by this whole ordeal. Before you considered your newfound interest that replaced most of your initial fear and disgust just that, an interest, but for some reason, the stomach of your little sis, busy dominating her breakfast with loud, all-encompassing rumbles and all manners of weird noises, turning an appealing sugary milky meal into this absolute mess, with only so much as a few burps being its last presence in the outside world...it's all strangely alluring to you now.

In the glow of it all, it takes a while before you realize it's been an even longer while. Like, hours longer. Ashley has completely fallen asleep. Well, as long as the acids keep having little effect on you, and you are greatly enjoying the depths of her belly, there's no reason not to let her have a nice lengthy nap.

Ashley lazily places her hand over her flat tummy in her sleep. Her sleepwear shirt has ridden up to her chest, fully exposing the surface of her belly.

*glooorrp* *sllrk* *guuuurgle* *grrrnnnbLORRP*

Her hand vibrates with each rumbling, bubbly sound. To the outside world, she's just a cute little girl having a nice nap, amusingly patting her noisy tummy as she sleeps. But inside of her...a big bowl of cereal finishes its torturous bath, ripped apart from its solid form, first by her chewing it, and then by her stomach acids melting it all into liquid.

You're startled as the entrance to her intestines opens up, and with a loud *shlooork*, begins to drain the viscous mixture from her stomach. You watch with undivided attention as the great pool you first dropped into goes away until a residual bit remains, keeping the stomach floor moist, but all that could be considered food that's left in her belly is you.

What an exhilarating experience. The beauty and power of your little sister's body spikes another strange arousal. It completely removes you from the reality that your skin was almost irreversibly scarred, and of course after that, it would have been game over for you. It's not likely you'll survive another round of sharing the hot tub with one of Ashley's meals.

A few hours later, Ashley slowly sits up. She stretches and yawns loudly, smacking her lips a couple times afterward and tasting the cereal and...you again.

She looks down at her bare belly, patting it with a giggle. "Can't let you out yet until everyone thinks you're gone! Is it fun in there?" Amidst her giggling, a big burp rockets out of her mouth, and once that air pressure is removed from her stomach, it growls hungrily, begging for more than her brother to fill it up.
1251222122.title: Hours Inside Your Sister

choices: Ashley goes to get some food, and you're trapped for quite a while
12512221221.content:
Ashley stands up, rubbing her eyes and yawning. The afternoon sun streaming through her window illuminates her slim figure and she takes a moment to appreciate that her small, thin body can easily fit her older brother inside it without a trace. She steps in front of her mirror and pulls her shirt off, running her hands down the pale skin of her taught stomach. She holds her breath and pushes her gut in and out, smiling, imagining what you're experiencing inside of her and enjoying the power. It might have been her imagination but she could almost swear that she felt a light fluttering inside her as she pushed you around.

Ashley shudders with power and pleasure and says to you, "Jack, you can hear me right? I love having you inside me! You're so helpless and cute and you make my tummy feel SO amazing!" She keeps one hand on her belly while saying this, pressing into the thin layer of fat, trying to feel you move.

Inside, however, you're not having as much fun.

The fluttering she felt was you being tossed around violently as her belly distended and contracted. Each contraction of her ab muscles felt like an earthquake and you would constantly lose your balance and fall onto her form, warm walls you've grown so accustomed to. No matter how loudly you scream and beg it's clear that Ashley can't hear you and wouldn't let you out anyway.

Both of your stomachs rumble at the same time, the only difference is you're at the mercy of Ashley's. You hear, "I guess you're too tiny to fill me up Jack!!" Followed by another belly shaking laugh.

125122212211.content:
It feels like you've regained your footing for only a second or two before you're tossed about again, as Ashley puts her shirt back on and excitedly bounds into the kitchen to prepare some food to fill her belly. Through the groaning walls of her stomach, you can barely make out the crinkly opening of a bag of chips. Sounds like she also got some stuff out of the fridge.

"I'm gonna make a big sandwich so you can eat some too, Jack!" She giggles, poking her tummy, "Just make sure to get it before my stomach gurgles it all up, kay?" The preteen girl briefly considers the possibility of you getting "gurgled up" along with her lunch, but quickly shrugs the concept off. You survived breakfast anyway. You probably could stay in her stomach forever...

All you can do at this point is sit in her empty belly and wait. You're pretty hungry too, and even though you'll be eating it all chewed-up, the idea of a sandwich sounds pretty good right now. Not like you could say anything to object, since she can't hear you. Faintly-glowing organic pink walls surround your entire being, glistening with liquid protecting them from the stomach acids you already are way too familiar with. Still, humid air permeates the space. It looks kinda weird to you without any food inside. You are definitely getting used to this arrangement. Booming, hungry rumbles that would've petrified you hours ago are now soothing, powerful displays of your sister's gentle dominance.

A few more minutes pass, as Ashley stacks cold cuts and some veggies slathered in mayo between two slices of bread, then pours herself some chips out onto a plate. She takes the prepared meal back to her room so she can eat with you without being bothered. Would be kinda weird to keep talking to her belly when she's trying to make you appear as missing.

She grins eagerly at the food about to meet a tasty fate in her mouth, and a much crueler end in her stomach. "Okay Jack, I'm gonna start eating now! Here comes the grub!"

Ashley takes her sandwich in both hands, and noms a great big bite out of it. She chews with her mouth open, producing loud smacking sounds and showing to a non-existent audience the mushy, saliva-coated contents sliding over her tongue as they are crushed. Once everything is good and softened, she closes her mouth shut and loudly gulps it all down.

*GULLP* "Ahh...enjoy! There's more where that came from!" She giggles, thinking of you happily living amongst her chewed-up food and eating it before her hungry stomach melts it all into nothing. Helpless older brother, dependent on his sister to feed him the slop she's already eaten...the thought excites her immensely.

A deep gurgle resounds throughout the hot chamber, signaling the arrival of a mound of food mush. Your own stomach rumbles in anticipation. You're starving. Reluctantly, you stick your hand into Ashley's mouthful and deposit some of it into your own maw. Looking at the chewed pile, you think you can make out...ham? Or is that roast beef? Lettuce and tomato in there, maybe? Not like you can separate by taste either; it's been much combined with the already-present mayo and new addition of young girl saliva. And yet...this isn't half bad...?

Suddenly, a great torrent of dark liquid flows into her belly, washing you away from the pile of food just as you tried to go in for seconds. Ah well, at your size even one mouthful will probably last a while, and she's still got a lot more food to go, so you might be able to get some more soon.

You notice that the small pool of drink you've now entered starts to fizz a little at the surface, and feels tingly on the skin that's submerged. It's soda!

*uuurrrppp* Ashley lets out a little burp. "Did that surprise you bro? Hahaha, it's like a little swimming pool!" She shakes around slightly, audibly sloshing the contents of her belly.
